ksa_text: Ability to assess available analytical tools and methods, select the appropriate technique for a given business problem, and evaluate method applicability against data characteristics, constraints, and required rigor.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Processes are in place for robust engagement with relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.434) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Operations. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Operations roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Applied Analytics & BI is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Operations. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Operations competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.434) and edge-domain placement (Applied Analytics & BI) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Operations. All passes support exclusion.
